SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.korean: [1~3라운드] 스킬1 사용 불가&n[4~6라운드] 스킬2 사용 불가&n[7~9라운드] 패시브 발동 불가&n타겟이 공격력 감소 5중첩일 시 방어력 감소 적용&n타겟이 방어력 감소 안걸려 있을 시 적중 감소 적용&n강화 불가
SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.english: [Rounds 1–3] Skill 1 cannot be used. [Rounds 4–6] Skill 2 cannot be used. [Rounds 7–9] Passive cannot be activated. If the target has 5 stacks of ATK reduction, DEF reduction is applied. If the target is not affected by DEF reduction, ACC reduction is applied. Buff Prevention.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.korean: 머신건을 조준 사격해 {0} 피해를 줍니다. 3라운드 동안 받는 피해가 증가하는 상태로 만듭니다.
SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.english: Fire an aimed machine gun shot to deal {0} damage. Inflicts increased damage taken for 3 rounds.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.korean: [1~3라운드] 각 속성 수치 30% 고정&n[4~6라운드] 각 속성 수치 -20% 하한&n[7~9라운드] 각 속성 수치 반전
SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.english: [Rounds 1–3] All attribute values fixed at 30%. [Rounds 4–6] All attribute values reduced to a minimum of -20%. [Rounds 7–9] All attribute values are inverted.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.korean: [1~3라운드] 공격 대상 도발&n[4~6라운드] 최대 행동 횟수 4회, 내 스킬 보호 무시 부여
SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.english: [Rounds 1–3] Attack target is Provoked. [Rounds 4–6] Max Action : 4, own skills gain Ignore Protection.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.korean: [1~3라운드] 각 속성 수치 30% 고정이 안걸려 있을 때&n인접 그리드에 1명 있을 때&n인접 그리드에 2명 있을 때
SkillDesc_Skill_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208_.english: [Rounds 1–3] When each attribute stat is not fixed at 30%. When 1 unit is in an adjacent grid. When 2 units are in adjacent grids.

BuffDesc1_Effect_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208.english: Buff Removal : All buffs are removed
Active 1 not available : Cannot be used
Active 2 not available : Cannot be used
Passive cannot be activated : Cannot be used

BuffDesc1_Effect_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208.korean: 맨 앞열 및 속성 디버프 시
BuffDesc1_Effect_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208.english: Front row and attribute debuff : Applied

BuffDesc1_Effect_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208.korean: 저항 수치 고정이 안걸려 있을 때

BuffDesc1_Effect_MP_NightChickSpCH_B0208.english: Adjacent 1 : When there is 1 unit in adjacent grid
Adjacent 2 : When there are 2 units in adjacent grids
No Adjacent : When there is no one in the adjacent grid
